stemHtml: Which of the following reasons is most likely to force a twin-jet aeroplane to perform an emergency landing?

options.a: Total loss of one of the three available hydraulic systems, on an aircraft with flight controls that are hydraulically powered.
options.b: An in-flight fire in the forward galley that has been positively identified as extinguished.
options.c: A total loss of the automatic pressurisation system just after take-off requiring manual intervention by the crew.
options.d: Multiple bird strikes during the take-off roll that cause an engine failure and erratic operation of the remaining engine.
